prestazioni: APR Stage 3+ turbo kit for the EA113 2.0 TFSI (CDL/CBF engine code) featuring a Garrett GTX3071R Gen II turbocharger with billet compressor wheel, 0.63 A/R turbine housing, and integrated wastegate, paired with APR’s CNC-machined 3-inch downpipe and high-flow catted exhaust system, supporting 450+ HP on E85 fuel with APR’s ECU/TCU software (v3.1.1) and upgraded fuel system (Bosch 440cc injectors, Walbro 450 LPH in-tank pump, and APR’s high-pressure fuel rail)

Bilstein B16 PSS10 coilovers with 8-position adjustable damping, custom-valved for the 8P S3’s MacPherson strut front and multi-link rear suspension, paired with H&R 25mm front and 22mm rear anti-roll bars, and polybushings (Powerflex Black Series) to eliminate subframe and control arm deflection under hard cornering

Wavetrac limited-slip differential (LSD) with 45% preload and carbon fiber clutch packs, installed in the 8P S3’s 02M 6-speed manual transmission (or 02Q DSG for auto variants), paired with an upgraded Sachs Performance dual-mass flywheel (SMFW) and South Bend Stage 3 daily clutch kit for the EA113’s 250 lb-ft torque capacity
estetica: Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit for the 8P S3, featuring carbon fiber front fenders with aggressive 30mm flares, rear quarter panels with integrated diffuser, and a duckbill-style carbon fiber rear spoiler, all paired with custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap and OEM+ gloss black Audi rings

OEM+ Euro-spec LED headlights (Hella 3R LED projectors) with integrated LUX V3 angel eyes and sequential turn signals, paired with a custom carbon fiber front splitter (APR GT3-style) and a rear diffuser from 034 Motorsport with integrated quad-exit exhaust cutouts for the APR downpipe setup

BBS CH-R 19x9.5 ET35 (front) and 19x10.5 ET40 (rear) forged wheels in gold finish, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (245/35/19 front, 265/30/19 rear), paired with OZ Racing titanium wheel bolts and H&R TRAK+ wheel spacers (15mm front, 20mm rear) for aggressive flush fitment
